description: Fashionable college, NBA and MLS apparel.

name: Depict
description: GPT Search & Merchandising for fashion e-commerce

name: AI.Fashion
description: AI.Fashion is the AI creative suite for the fashion industry.

name: Ole
description: Fashion shopping with delivery and return on demand
location: Tel Aviv-Yafo, Tel Aviv District, Israel

name: Fetchr
description: The Personal Shopper  in Your Pocket

name: 3D Look
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-powered mobile body measuring and virtual try-on technologies designed to focus on personalization in retail. The company's virtual shopping software provides personalized and engaging user experiences, thereby helping businesses to reduce returns and apparel waste while increasing conversions and customer satisfaction.

name: Thamarah Al-Jill Co LLC
description: Developer of an online shopping platform intended to connect buyers and sellers looking for authenticated preowned luxury fashion. The company's platform is for preloved luxury fashion with a conscience where they provide an inventory of unique pieces; including handbags, shoes, accessories, and jewelry, with rare, discontinued, or limited edition pieces, enabling shoppers to access limited exclusive luxury items at a competitive cost.

name: Avant
description: Operator of a homegrown brand intended to offer halal personal care products. The company specializes in skincare and cosmetics enabling it to offer all-natural, non-inflammatory, non-toxic, and effective ingredients to address various skin concerns, enabling consumers to get quality skincare products.

name: Bustle
description: Developer of a digital media platform designed for young readers. The company's platform delivers everything readers want to read, including news, celebrity, culture, lifestyle, politics, fashion and beauty, enabling readers and social fans to get everything they need to know in one place and stay updated on all the things they love.

name: nabfly
description: Provider of subscription-based collection of lifestyle products intended to offer uniquely standalone goods for men. The company's products include a collection of lifestyle products that are limited edition products packaged together in a box driven by a specific story or theme in the areas of style, grooming, food, drink, and gear, enabling men to have a club membership and personalized mix of products based on their interests.

name: Original
description: Developer of a body measurement platform designed to analyze the whole body using artificial intelligence (AI) technology. The company's platform predicts a person's body shape and size under their clothing using photos taken by a user against any background, enabling users with not only size recommendations but also detailed fit information to understand exactly how a garment will fit and why it was recommended.

name: Brodo
description: Manufacturer of men's fashion and footwear products intended to provide stylish, well-made, and affordable footwear. The company offers a wide range of products, from formal and casual shoes, as well as sneakers and boots, enabling buyers to get better quality shoes from both online and retail stores.

name: Kitterly
description: Operator of a craft supplies marketplace intended to offer knitting and crochet kits. The company's marketplace offers a wide range of yarns, buttons, ring markers, and needles, enabling consumers to purchase crochet items seamlessly.

name: Coveti
description: Operator of an online fashion marketplace intended to cater to men and women. The company offers includes women's fashion, men's fashion, and accessories and specializes in offering designs from emerging designers, enabling independent fashion designers to produce on-demand garments and users to enjoy customized apparel.

name: CrowdMade
description: Developer of an online platform intended for creating custom merchandise. The company creates custom merchandise like apparel, mugs, and other products that are available for sale through its online platform, enabling creators to upload their designs to the platform and receive payment for each product sold.

name: Dabchy
description: Operator of a peer-to-peer fashion marketplace intended to connect buyers and sellers for online shopping. The company offers a marketplace that is a mix of a social network and a forum where people like and comment on the articles posted and give each other fashion tips, enabling customers to buy, sell, exchange, and review new and used fashion items with ease.

name: Detoure
description: Developer of resale marketplace intended to source highly curated clothing from influencers and tastemakers, giving customers access to the most coveted closets in the world at thrift prices. The company helps to create a place to shop second-hand clothes directly from the style icons influencers and to provide a way for influencers to quickly capitalize on their most valuable asset their closet, enabling customers to sell their closet without spending valuable time building and maintaining a shop on other platforms.

name: EasySize
description: Provider of size and fit recommendation services intended to help shoppers buy fashion that fits and looks great on them without the hassle of returns. The company's platform combines deep diverse data with advanced algorithms and does not require body measurements, garment measurements, or size charts, providing an upscale in user confidence, enhancing sales, and reducing returns for fashion merchants, enabling shop consultants to reduce the waste of manufacturing, storing, shipping and at times destruction of the merchandise.

name: Eyewa
description: Operator of an online optical store intended to simplify the eyewear shopping experience. The company's store offers several types of eyewear including sunglasses, prescription glasses, blue-light reading glasses, and contact lenses, enabling customers to have access to an easy and affordable fashion-focused experience.

name: FabFitFun
description: Operator of a lifestyle membership platform intended to provide women with products from premium and emerging brands. The company's platform includes a curated collection of full-size products across beauty, fashion, wellness, fitness, home and technology and provides a streaming video service offering on-demand wellness videos and daily lifestyle content, an online community and year-round exclusive sales and shopping experiences, enabling women to lead healthier lifestyles.

name: Fy
description: Developer of an online shopping platform designed to offer fashion accessories. The company's platform offers jewelry, watches, wall art, electronics and beauty products and also provides free shipping facilities, enabling users to get assured quality products at a reasonable price.

name: Glambot
description: Operator of an online platform intended to sell pre-owned make-up and cosmetics. The company's platform includes used makeup products that get cleaned and sanitized by experts, enabling customers to get the largest collection of rare, limited edition, and discontinued items from coveted makeup brands.

name: Gloset
description: Operator of a digital e-commerce platform intended to provide second-hand clothes. The company's platform includes formal wear, party wear, sportswear, maternity clothes, shoes, and accessories, enabling customers to choose various fashion accessories at an affordable price.

name: Glyph
description: Manufacturer of footwear products intended to sell hand-knitted shoes. The company offers shoes whose upper portion is constructed from a blend of knitted fibers and is fully recyclable thus making them lighter, and more flexible, and ensuring that the shoes will last for a longer period of time, enabling customers to buy hand-knitted shoes for more comfort and style.

name: ARG
description: Operator of a social e-commerce site for action sports based in San Francisco, California. The company provides its community with a curated selection of established and upcoming outdoor lifestyle brands.

name: Grana
description: Operator of an online garment shopping platform intended to sell clothes with good quality clothing at a reasonable price level. The company's clothes are directly sourced products from garment factories to reduce the unnecessary markup pricing in modern boutiques/ garment stores and the company also operates an offline showroom called "The Fitting Room" in Hong Kong which allows customers to try on their products before ordering them online, enabling clients to buy finest fabric, fashionable design and fitted clothes at affordable prices.

name: HeartThis
description: Provider of an online shopping platform. The company provides users with an online platform to purchase goods and accessories of various brands, with home delivery.

name: HijUp
description: Operator of an online fashion and lifestyle e-commerce platform designed to serve Muslim women. The company's platform offers a wide range of products including square hijab, scarf caps, long dresses, blazers and skirts as well as accessories such as masks, brooches, socks and necklaces.

name: Inflow
description: Operator of a supply chain and manufacturing platform for fashion brands. The company's platform offers a diversified manufacturing network that simplifies the supply chain process from sourcing to manufacturing and shipping, enabling clients to easily source, track, and manage their production by offering trendy designs including sustainable fabric options.

name: In Your Shoe
description: The company offers unique outwear, homeware, socks, sportswear, and accessories that cater to all different tastes and are of high quality, providing users with diverse statement and playful designs of apparel.

name: iPrice
description: Developer of an online price comparison platform designed to provide information for multi-category products. The company's product catalog includes electronic products, fashion apparel, home improvements, baby products, accessories and commercial content, enabling users to find affordable products across multiple online retail sites and purchase them easily.

name: Ipsy
description: Operator of an online beauty platform intended to inspire individuals and offer beauty ideas. The company's platform contains articles, videos blogs, and retail personalized products through their monthly membership subscription, enabling users to get tools to define their own definition of beauty and feel confident.

name: Italist
description: Operator of an e-commerce fashion platform intended to offer new fashion updates from luxury brands all over the world. The company's platform offers a wide range of clothing, accessories, shoes, bags, and jewelry from all luxury brands, enabling customers to purchase authentic items at a discounted price with quality services.

name: Jewelbots
description: Developer of a technology-enabled bracelet designed to fuse fashion and technology for teenagers. The company's bracelet offers communication and sends personal alerts through customizable programming and coding, enabling teenage girls to communicate with their friends using lights and vibrations.

name: Johrh
description: Operator of an online abaya store intended to serve in GCC selling a wide range of clothes. The company offers good quality materials of abayas in different fabrics and can order as per size requirements, enabling customers to access an online destination for abayas at affordable prices.

name: LNKO
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer trendy eyewear. The company's platform provides a collection of optic wearables for both men and women, enabling users to choose from a variety of frame styles and colors of eyeglasses.

name: Maker.me
description: Developer of a content marketing platform designed to create and deliver engaging marketing campaigns. The company's platform combines design, web-publishing, and analytics tools in a single interface that can enhance any existing site to create, publish and optimize content for their landing and product pages, enabling clients to enrich their sites, increasing engagement, conversion, and revenue growth.

name: Markhor
description: Manufacturer of leather footwear intended to provide bespoke leather goods to customers. The company's footwear includes shoes for men and women, sandals, and electronic gadget covers that are made from pure leather which is sourced from selected local tanneries, enabling customers to get handmade products that reflect traditional craftsmanship.

name: Mayvenn
description: Retailer of online hair care products intended to provide quality beauty products with an unparalleled shopping experience. The company's services offer tools to hair stylists to sell hair extensions directly to their clients without the burden of upfront costs and holding inventory, allowing customers to shop in a dignified way while receiving related products and services.

name: Mejuri
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to sell handcrafted fine jewelry for everyday use. The company's direct-to-consumer e-commerce platform features products such as rings, pendants, earrings, bracelets, and other luxury jewelry made up of precious and semi-precious stones, enabling women to buy handcrafted accessories online.

name: CopThis
description: Operator of an online retail marketplace intended to sell music band merchandise. The company's marketplace allows fans to discover and buy merchandise such as clothes, accessories, bags, digital video discs, and vinyl from their favorite music artists, enabling fans to buy their desired accessories and merchandise at a reasonable price range.

name: MeUndies
description: Manufacturer of underwear and loungewear for men and women. The company offers bralettes, socks, swimwear, hoodies, robes, headbands and buddy bands, thereby enabling customers with comfortable and fast-trend undies and apparel at an affordable rate.

name: MORI
description: Operator of an e-commerce platform intended to offer clothing products and essentials for infants and toddlers. The company's products are made from organic cotton and bamboo for sensitive skin and processed without the use of harmful chemicals, enabling customers to have soft and hygienic clothing materials for their babies at an affordable cost.

name: Mr. Draper
description: Provider of an online fashion advisory platform intended to offer curated shopping service for men. The company's platform offers a personalized shopping service where one can seek new fashion suggestions from stylists and ask the kind of apparel to be worn for a particular occasion as per individual size, complexion, and height, enabling men shoppers to find and order personalized outfits that are delivered at desired venues.

name: Omate
description: Developer of smart wearables designed to track and monitor vital signs. The company leverages technology to design and manufacture smart watches which monitor temperature, heart rate, sleep monitoring, GPS for kids watches, and fitness tracking, and also provides enterprise IoT solutions, enabling customers to better track and monitor their health.

name: Shoppr
description: Developer of a data analytics platform designed to provide data to fashion brands. The company platform allows fashion businesses to manage market trends and insights, manage product demand, materials, colours and styles as well as offers real-time market intelligence data to fashion brands globally, enabling brands to find and target leads and helping in customer acquisition and retention.

name: Orori
description: Manufactuer of luxury jewelry intended to offer various types of accessories to customers to choose from. The company's portal permits users to trade second-hand jewelry and scrap gold for refinement and offers gold, diamonds, and other designer and custom-made jewelry including gold bars as well, enabling customers to choose from a wide range of options as well as get customized jewelry.

name: PopXO
description: Provider of an online influencer marketing community platform intended to blend content and commerce. The company's platform is based on a digital publication that creates stories, videos, and social media content in six languages about the things young Indian women care about including fashion, beauty, lifestyle, weddings, and work-related topics and publish on the platform, thereby enabling women to lead their lives through data-driven insights.

name: ScentBird
description: Operator of a subscription-based perfume retail platform intended to revolutionize the way people shop for fragrances. The company's platform provides different types of fragrances through an online platform that is tailor-made for both men and women, enabling consumers to access a wide range of scents at affordable rates.

name: ShopLook
description: Developer of an online fashion clothing platform designed to resolve fashion-related questions with the use of artificial intelligence. The company's platform lets users create designs using a selection of buyable products and images and follow their favorite designers and shop items, enabling women to discover and shop expertly designed outfit ideas for any occasion, body type, and budget.

name: SidelineSwap
description: Operator of an online sports gear marketplace intended to allow athletes to indulge in trading sports equipment. The company's marketplace connects athletes to facilitate the process of buying and selling sports goods and gear, enabling athletes to save costs involved in purchasing the sports gear outright.

name: StalkBuyLove
description: Provider of an online marketplace designed to sell fashion apparel and accessories for women. The company's online marketplace stitches garments at scale with full integration into mobile distribution and supply, enabling consumers to get products of their choice at a low cost.

name: Tees
description: Operator of an online clothing marketplace intended to offer a variety of merchandise. The company's marketplace sells graphics printed products such as t-shirts, bags, pillows, tumblers, hoodies, jackets, mobile cases, and posters on demand, enabling customers to buy products at affordable prices and get them home delivered.

name: uScoop
description: Operator of an online retail platform intended to provide classic and all-American lifestyle products. The company operates as an e-commerce platform selling clothing, accessories, home decor items, and gift products, enabling customers to get all types of home accessories and gift products under one roof at reasonable prices.

name: Wifkain
description: Developer of a manufacturing-as-a-service platform designed to connect fashion businesses with fabric suppliers. The company's platform specializes in making it convenient to receive fabrics from suppliers directly, both online and offline to oversee transparent production progress, enabling users to view and order fabrics and order samples effortlessly with direct touch and sensation at all times.

name: Abbeypost
description: Operator of online marketplace and community. The company provides software-driven custom apparel and focuses on the needs of the plus size women's fashion market.

name: Clothes Horse
description: Provider of online data-driven platform to help consumers to shop for clothing. The company provides a data-driven recommendations tool that recommends the best fitting clothes based on a shopper's body size and favorite past purchases.

name: Villoid
description: Operator of fashion social platform. The company's online platform is a dressing up box, where you can express your unique style, follow inspiring people and get updates from your favorite brands providing customers about latest trends in dressing sense and brands.

name: Upteam
description: Operator of an online curated platform intended to sell luxury vintage goods. The company's platform offers a collection of certified pre-owned, vintage and collectible merchandise including handbags, apparel, watches, spectacles, jewelry and accessories, of renowned brands, enabling customers to buy high-end luxury vintage goods at an affordable price.

name: Wittlebee
description: Provider of online kids apparel. The company provides basics like onesies, t-shirts, socks and leggings. It also creates custom packages for its members based on their child's age, color preferences and geographic location.

name: Jobedu
description: Retailer of streetwear and accessories intended to blend Arab culture with global popular culture. The company's streetwear curates the works of Arab designers and modern trends, enabling customers to create a sustainable brand that embodies Arab culture.

name: Milk and Honey
description: Operator of a women's footwear brand. The company allows women to design their own footwear online from the various designs offered that includes platform pumps, stilettos, pumps, flats, oxford heels, oxford flats, wedges, platform wedges, wedges, boots, moto boots, booties, ankle boots, platform sandals, sandals and flat sandals.

name: Tradesy
description: Operator of an online peer-to-peer marketplace for fashion. The company provides an online marketplace to connect sellers to like-minded buyers and provides packaging materials, shoes and accessories. In addition, it recommends pricing and handles returns.

name: LE TOTE
description: Operator of an online clothing rental platform designed to help in borrowing everyday clothing. The company's clothing rental platform focuses on replicating the offline behavior of swapping and sharing clothes, enabling consumers to borrow clothing and accessories through an online portal.

name: Leflair
description: Provider of an e-commerce platform intended to offer foreign brands in Vietnam. The company's online platform is engaged in the sale of women's and men's fashion, beauty, home and kids products, enabling customers to find and buy international branded products at good deal.

name: Snapette
description: Developer of software applications for mobile phone. The company provides software for mobile phone that helps to discover and share photos of shoes and bags.

name: FIGS
description: Manufacturer and seller of antimicrobial and wrinkle-free medical uniforms. The company's medical apparel is antimicrobial, wrinkle resistant, stain repellant, lint free and utilizes four-way stretch and is sold online via its customer-centric, vertically integrated ecommerce platform, enabling the customers to order medical apparel in different sizes and as per convenience.

name: Cladwell
description: Operator of an online retail store for men. The company offers customers comprehensive assessment of their body type, fashion preferences, and personal and professional lifestyle.

name: TheAmazeApp
description: Developer and provider of fashion blogging application. The company offers a mobile blogging application that helps users to share fashion tips, shop online and connect to bloggers, stylists and designers in Munchen, Germany

name: Kenz
description: Developer of an online lingerie selling platform designed to provide style and comfort to women residing in the Middle East. The company's platform offers custom fitting innerwear products ranging from bras, vests, pants, sleepwear, pajamas, socks and eye mask, enabling women to have an effortless experience of buying good fitting lingerie.

name: The Beard Club
description: Provider of grooming and beard products for men. The company provides subscription based high quality beard and grooming products, beard gear, oil, male gel and accessories for men that are made from organic materials.

name: TotSpot
description: Provider of a peer-to-peer mobile marketplace designed to sell children's fashion clothing. The company's peer-to-peer mobile marketplace features an intuitive and sleek interface that provides fast, easy and safe parent-to-parent transactions, while offering an outlet for family focused communities to inspire and learn from one another, enabling users to shop and sell clothes for kids.

name: Eloquii
description: Provider of an online platform intended to offer trendy plus size fashion. The company's e-commerce platform offers contemporary fast fashion, with everything from dresses to outerwear to shoes, in sizes 14 to 28 and offers customers access to unique content through its Style & Substance blog and curated catalog, enabling plus-size women to dress and participate in fashion.

name: WalkerCo
description: Manufacturer of health and beauty products intended to build the consumer-centric health and beauty product to inspire consumer loyalty. The company's health and beauty products includes moisturizing shave and hair care collection that help reduce shaving irritation and razor bumps and the products are thoroughly coactive, formulations actively work together, enabling users to get keep their skin and hair happy and to help their hair feel healthier.
